# opnsense_quagga_ospf6_general (Resource)

Manages OSPFv3 (IPv6) general configuration on OPNsense (FRR). Singleton resource. Requires the `os-frr` plugin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `carp_demote` (Boolean) Demote CARP if OSPFv3 is not converged. Defaults to `false`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable OSPFv3. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default` (Boolean) Originate a default route. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default_always` (Boolean) Always originate the default route. Defaults to `false`.
- `originate_default_metric` (Number) Metric for the originated default route (0 = unset).
- `router_id` (String) OSPFv3 router ID (IPv4-format identifier).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic identifier (always `ospf6`).
